headline: Gemini Transfers $10M Bitcoin to Trump PAC

article.title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
article.summary: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

headline: Coinbase Enables $1B USDC Payments via AI Agents

article.title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
article.summary: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

headline: Lyntris Files $100M US IPO Amid Defense Sector Surge

article.title: Trive-Backed Lyntris Files For US IPO, Joining Defense Rush
article.summary: Lyntris Inc., a defense technology firm backed by Trive Capital, filed for a US initial public offering.

headline: Asian Stocks Drop as Oil Spikes Past $100

article.title: Asian Stocks Set to Fall as Oil Surges Past $100: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Stocks in Asia were poised for declines after a sharp Wall Street selloff, while oil surged above $100 a barrel for the first time in two months as an escalating Middle East conflict stoked fears of renewed inflation.
